differentiation: Focus on India-specific coffee lover identity.

businessPlan.businessStrategy: Founder-batch launch using organic trust-building, waitlist capture, marketplace conversion, and controlled paid testing.

contract.name: Cost Engineer
contract.promptContract: Calculate realistic unit economics and recommended selling prices.
contract.role: Calculate landed cost, margin, break-even quantity, ROI, and pricing.

costAssumptions: Costs are deterministic planning estimates until supplier quotes are collected.
Taxes, marketplace fees, and shipping slabs must be verified before purchase order.
Pilot costing assumes 100-500 units and manual quality inspection.
financialRoadmap.roiEstimate: 1.8x on first 500 units if sell-through exceeds 70%

productRoadmap.digitalCompanion: Landing page with founder story, waitlist, and customer feedback capture
productRoadmap.subscription: Monthly themed drop if repeat demand is validated
productRoadmap.version1: Luma Logic Cubes Starter validation kit
productRoadmap.version2: Gift-ready standard kit with improved packaging
productRoadmap.version3: Premium bundle with stronger brand story and add-ons

riskRoadmap.mitigation: Keep actions in approval-gated draft mode until provider credentials are configured.
riskRoadmap.risk: Live publish APIs are not connected in deterministic Sprint 6 MVP.

riskRoadmap.mitigation: Legal approval gate blocks safety and certification claims before publishing.
riskRoadmap.risk: Child-product claims may require legal review.

governanceBoundaries: No irreversible action without configured approval policy.

Self-improvement may improve workflows and prompts but cannot change immutable governance rules.
